name: Оперативный мониторинг (Corp)
description: Статусы и последние записи витрины v_egisz_transactions_enriched.

cards.name: Распределение статусов
cards.description: Успех / ошибка / неизвестно по fact pipeline.

native.query: SELECT status AS status, COUNT(*)::bigint AS cnt FROM public.v_egisz_transactions_enriched GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC
SELECT relates_to_id, jid, kind_code, kind_name, status, processed_at, clinic_name FROM public.v_egisz_transactions_enriched ORDER BY processed_at DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 50
